prompt: The tests in test_project.py are failing. We renamed the public API from fetch_data to retrieve_data but forgot to update the implementation files. Rename all fetch_data variants to retrieve_data across the entire codebase and make the tests pass.
on_fail: Some tests are still failing. Check every .py file for leftover references to fetch_data.

goals.description: Grep for fetch_data, read all 8 source files, rename in each with multi-edit, verify. Ideal: ~12 turns. Inefficient: 25+ turns with per-file read-edit-check cycles.
